chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1538 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on M.A. No.6425/2022. 2. For orders on office objections appearing on reverse of memo of petition. 3. For hearing of M.A. No.5333/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 17.05.2022 Mrs. Nasim Abbasi, Advocate for the petitioner. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. The petitioner in this petition is essentially seeking directions in respect of an appeal pending before the concerned Authority i.e Chief Minister of Sindh for her promotion; she being a Civil Servant, as not disputed by the learned counsel for the petitioner, has invoked jurisdiction of this Court that directions be given to the Authority concerned to decide fate of her appeal in accordance with law. We are afraid that unless we are conferred with the jurisdiction, such directions cannot be given. Learned counsel for the petitioner has conceded that no doubt it is a jurisdiction of a Tribunal but the only direction being sought in this petition, is for early disposal of her appeal that concerns her promotion. This being a situation, we are not inclined to pass any direction, as this petition is not maintainable hence same accordingly is dismissed with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
